notes: Phase Y Wave B (2026-05-03) test count reset: 515 → 485. Coverage floors are NOT lowered — the phase removed 30 tests that tested deleted types (LocalDev, resolvers, writers: 26 from full-file deletes + 4 method-level deletes), so the absolute coverage percentage is expected to change but the ratchet remains at the original floors. Raise only when a confirmed coverage increase lands, never lower to paper over a regression. Coverage report location: artifacts/test-results/build-tests/coverage.cobertura.xml (override via --coverage-file=<path> Cake argument).
